<!-- AUTO-GENERATED from SemanticAnalyzer.analyze() — do not edit manually -->
The semantic analyzer runs an ordered pipeline of 13 phases:

1. Register stdlib symbols
2. Ensure foundation materialized for rest apis
3. Collect symbols
4. Resolve imports
5. Materialize stdlib symbols used in bodies
6. Resolve references
7. Resolve field types
8. Populate callable block names
9. Merge inheritance
10. Synthesize fk fields
11. Resolve all index fields
12. Check types
13. Run domain validators
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED -->
